window_summary: This window tracks the recent zxing/zxing release stream across core library releases and related Barcode Scanner app releases, showing the evolution from early 2014 through 2025.

chunks.title: ZXing 3.0.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: zxing/zxing
Release: ZXing 3.0.0
Tag: zxing-3.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2014-02-28T12:35:59Z; created_at: 2014-02-28T12:27:03Z
Release notes:
- iphone/, cpp/, objc/, and glass-mirror/ are retired
- Java 7 now used for all Java-based modules
- Project moved to github.com/zxing/zxing
- Many small bug fixes and improvements
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.0.0 (tag zxing-3.0.0) retires the iphone/, cpp/, objc/, and glass-mirror/ modules, adopts Java 7 for all Java-based modules, moves the project to github.com/zxing/zxing, and includes many small bug fixes and improvements.

chunks.title: Barcode Scanner for Google Glass 0.2.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: zxing/zxing
Release: Barcode Scanner for Google Glass 0.2.0
Tag: BSGlass-0.2.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2014-04-26T11:47:56Z; created_at: 2014-04-26T11:02:51Z
Release notes:
You should be able to install with `adb install BarcodeScannerGlass-0.2.0.apk`
- To invoke it, use the "Translate" command and choose Barcode Scanner.
- It works on Glass XE16
- Right now, it only scans for QR Code, Data Matrix and Aztec.
- On the result display, tap to follow a link or search for the text
- Swipe down to go back
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release Barcode Scanner for Google Glass 0.2.0 (tag BSGlass-0.2.0) can be installed via adb, invoked using the "Translate" command, works on Glass XE16, scans only QR Code, Data Matrix and Aztec, and allows tapping to follow a link or search for text, with swipe down to go back.

Release: ZXing 3.3.0
Tag: zxing-3.3.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2016-09-16T14:34:31Z; created_at: 2016-09-16T14:20:48Z
Release notes:
- Minor core API additions like `Result.getNumBits`, raw bytes for Aztec
- Small changes for Java 9 compatibility

- TIFF support in online decoder

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.3.0 (tag zxing-3.3.0) adds minor core API additions like Result.getNumBits and raw bytes for Aztec, small changes for Java 9 compatibility, includes Barcode Scanner 4.7.6 with Android API 23 support, adds TIFF support in the online decoder, and includes many small bug fixes, typo fixes and project build improvements.

chunks.title: ZXing 3.3.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: zxing/zxing
Release: ZXing 3.3.1
Tag: zxing-3.3.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2017-10-25T17:36:09Z; created_at: 2017-10-25T17:28:06Z
Release notes:
- Various fixes to Code 128, 39 encoding; DataMatrix decoding
- Improvements to speed and robustness of zxing.org decoder
- Java 9 support
- Various translation updates for Barcode Scanner
- Removed Google Glass, ZXing Test apps
- Barcode Scanner 4.7.7
- Note: `core` library will require Android SDK 19+ when used in an Android app
https://github.com/zxing/zxing/issues?q=is%3Aclosed+milestone%3A3.3.1
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.3.1 (tag zxing-3.3.1) includes various fixes to Code 128 and 39 encoding and DataMatrix decoding, improvements to speed and robustness of the zxing.org decoder, Java 9 support, various translation updates for Barcode Scanner, removes Google Glass and ZXing Test apps, includes Barcode Scanner 4.7.7, and notes that the core library will require Android SDK 19+ when used in an Android app.

chunks.title: ZXing 3.4.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: zxing/zxing
Release: ZXing 3.4.0
Tag: zxing-3.4.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2019-05-18T03:44:20Z; created_at: 2019-05-18T00:36:13Z
Release notes:
- Requires Java 8+. Note: Android apps using this version must target API 24 or higher.
- `core`, `javase` modules declare a Java 9+ module
- `HtmlAssetTranslator` and `StringsResourceTranslator` legacy utilities are moved to a `.client.j2se` subpackage
- No more releases of the Barcode Scanner app
- Minor bug fixes to `Code93Writer`
- Minor improvements to QR code detection
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.4.0 (tag zxing-3.4.0) requires Java 8+ (Android apps must target API 24 or higher), declares a Java 9+ module for core and javase modules, moves HtmlAssetTranslator and StringsResourceTranslator legacy utilities to a .client.j2se subpackage, announces no more releases of the Barcode Scanner app, includes minor bug fixes to Code93Writer, and minor improvements to QR code detection.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.5.0 (tag zxing-3.5.0) includes many edge-case fixes and improvements from oss-fuzz, various improvements and fixes to Aztec, PDF417, and DataMatrix decoding, and a new 'minimal' encoding mode.

chunks.raw_text:

Release: ZXing 3.5.1

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.5.1 (tag zxing-3.5.1) includes various minor bug fixes, including more from oss-fuzz, avoids very long detection of QR codes in two types of pathological cases, and ensures QR code decoding does not fail if GB2312 is not supported by the JDK.

chunks.title: ZXing 3.5.3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: zxing/zxing
Release: ZXing 3.5.3
Tag: zxing-3.5.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-01-31T00:46:09Z; created_at: 2024-01-31T00:37:17Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix MaxiCode handling of vertical quiet zone by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1671
* Removing the forced content limit check for Code128Writer.java by @himanshushukla254 in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1675
* Detect RSS Expanded finder pattern false positives by checking sequences by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1680
* Update GS1 AIs according to 2023 specification by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1681
* Prevent --raw CLR option from failing if result.getRawBytes() is null by @dlenski in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1683
* Avoid 2 more RSS Expanded finder pattern false positive scenarios by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1692
* Avoid decoding stacked row 1 of N independently by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1693
* Support for platforms where SJIS is unavailable by @blakepuhak in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1747
## New Contributors
* @himanshushukla254 made their first contribution in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1675
* @blakepuhak made their first contribution in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1747
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zxing/zxing/compare/zxing-3.5.2...zxing-3.5.3
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.5.3 (tag zxing-3.5.3) includes fixes for MaxiCode handling of vertical quiet zone, removal of forced content limit check for Code128Writer, detection of RSS Expanded finder pattern false positives, update of GS1 AIs according to 2023 specification, prevention of --raw CLR option failure when result.getRawBytes() is null, avoidance of two more RSS Expanded finder pattern false positive scenarios, avoidance of decoding stacked row 1 of N independently, and support for platforms where SJIS is unavailable.

chunks.title: ZXing 3.5.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: zxing/zxing
Release: ZXing 3.5.4
Tag: zxing-3.5.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-11T21:17:19Z; created_at: 2025-11-11T20:38:31Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix container inefficiency in RSSExpandedReader.java by @cinsttool in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1782
* Fix SYMBOLOGY_IDENTIFIER Loss in QRCodeMultiReader to Ensure Data Integrity and Functional Consistency with QRCodeReader by @xiebaiyuan in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1839
* Be more stringent on email validation rules by @ftiercelin in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1870
* PDF417: Check that input is made of 0...127 chars when using Compaction.TEXT, throw an explicit exception if not the case by @ftiercelin in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1878
* Fixing issue #1831 by @ftiercelin in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1879
* Add hint to correct wrong dimension by @magethle in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1901
* Fix distortion calculation for isosceles right triangles by @magethle in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1908
* Add input validation for pixel array length in RGBLuminanceSource to avoid ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException by @leofernandesmo in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/1961
* Add 90-degree rotation support to RGBLuminanceSource by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/2012
* Add GrayscaleLuminanceSource by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/2013
* Loosen ITF max variance for 3x module widths by @gredler in https://github.com/zxing/zxing/pull/2014
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zxing/zxing/compare/zxing-3.5.3...zxing-3.5.4
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, release ZXing 3.5.4 (tag zxing-3.5.4) includes fixes for container inefficiency in RSSExpandedReader, SYMBOLOGY_IDENTIFIER loss in QRCodeMultiReader, more stringent email validation rules, PDF417 input validation for Compaction.TEXT, a fix for issue #1831, a hint to correct wrong dimension, distortion calculation fix for isosceles right triangles, input validation for pixel array length in RGBLuminanceSource, addition of 90-degree rotation support to RGBLuminanceSource, addition of GrayscaleLuminanceSource, and loosening of ITF max variance for 3x module widths.

questions.query_text: In the zxing/zxing repository, which release introduces a new option to stop automatic orientation changes and a new option to automatically open web pages?

answer_support.answer_text: introduces a new option to stop automatic orientation changes and a new option to automatically open web pages

questions.query_text: Across the zxing/zxing releases, how does the Barcode Scanner 4.7.8 release differ from the ZXing 3.4.0 release regarding the future of the Barcode Scanner app?

options.text: 4.7.8 suggests it may be the last release due to Play Store API requirements, while 3.4.0 explicitly states no more releases of the Barcode Scanner app.
4.7.8 adds new scanning features, while 3.4.0 removes the app entirely.
Both releases announce the end of the Barcode Scanner app.
4.7.8 is a major feature update, while 3.4.0 is a minor bug fix.

questions.expected_answer: 4.7.8 suggests it may be the last release due to Play Store API requirements, while 3.4.0 explicitly states no more releases of the Barcode Scanner app.

answer_support.answer_text: may be the last release of the app, as Play will soon require APKs to target API level 26
No more releases of the Barcode Scanner app

questions.query_text: In the zxing/zxing release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that retires the actionscript port, (2) a release that retires the jruby binding and adds the ability for Barcode Scanner to disable history, (3) a release that removes Google Glass and ZXing Test apps and notes that the core library will require Android SDK 19+, (4) a release that announces no more releases of the Barcode Scanner app and requires Java 8+.

answer_support.answer_text: retires the jruby binding and adds the ability for Barcode Scanner to disable history
removes Google Glass and ZXing Test apps and notes that the core library will require Android SDK 19+
announces no more releases of the Barcode Scanner app and requires Java 8+
